# INDEX - nexre

## PRDs

- `PRD-001-offline-sync/prd.md` - Let readers save articles and keep reading without a network.

## Stories

- `PRD-001-offline-sync/stories/ST-101-queue-writes.md` - Persist offline mutations and replay them when online.
- `PRD-001-offline-sync/stories/ST-102-conflict-ui.md` - Surface last-write-wins conflicts to the reader.
- `PRD-001-offline-sync/stories/ST-103-offline-reader.md` - Open a saved article with no network and see full content.
